summary: Iteration 42 - v8.1.0 System Health Dashboard DOUBLE VERIFICATION PASSED. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). All 14 frontend System Health Dashboard items verified. All 38 test items from the verification checklist passed. Ready for live trading.
